title: Amtech U4250 Tungsten Carbide Multi Sharpener with Oiler
features: 2 FUNCTIONS: This tungsten carbide multi-sharpener is designed for oiling and sharpening all types of garden tool blades
OIL INCLUDED: It comes complete with a supply of oil - simply unscrew the end for access
FOR ALL GARDEN TOOLS: It is the ideal garden tool sharpener for grass hooks, garden knives, pruning shears, lopper blades and more
COMPACT: It is a compact pocket size for easy storage
PLEASE NOTE: This blade sharpener is not suitable for scalloped or serrated blades
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your home, garage and gardening requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Box Contains: 1 x Amtech Multi Sharpener with Oil Amtech U4250 Tungsten Carbide Multi-Sharpener A perfect garden tool sharpener for your garden tools Garden tools, particularly pruning shears and loppers are much easier and safer to use when the blades are sharp. A clean cut is also better for the plant or shrub. The multi-sharpener also has a useful oiler on the end, as well as a dedicated hole for attaching keyrings. Please note the oiler should ideally be used before storing the tool, to prevent the blade from rusting when not in use. Please note: This product is not suitable for scalloped, serrated edge or ceramic bladed knives. Compact Size User-friendly Multi-Sharpener Durable and long-lasting Oiler with Keyring At the end of this tool, you will find an oiler along with a dedicated hole for attaching keyrings. The oiler is used to prevent the tool blade from rusting and essentially increases the durability of the product long term. Tungsten Carbide Blade This ergonomic design tool is armed with a Tungsten Carbide Blade that helps sharpen the edges of most garden tool’s blades with precision. Multi-Purpose Apart from sharpening various gardening tools, you can also use this sharpener to sharpen common household knives. Customer Service Amtech provide 3-year product guarantee with free product advice service - see pack for more details.
